scripts.build:native: clang++ -shared -fPIC -O2 -fobjc-arc -Wno-deprecated-declarations -framework Foundation -framework ImageIO -framework AVFoundation -framework CoreGraphics -framework CoreMedia -o resources/native/libkarttakuvat.dylib resources/native/karttakuvat-bridge.mm
scripts.bundle:scripts: bun build src/server/sync.ts --outdir build/scripts --target bun --external prettier
scripts.dev: bun run build:native && bun run --hot src/server/server.ts
scripts.dev:app: bun run build:native && bun run bundle:scripts && electrobun build && electrobun dev
scripts.build:app: bun run build:native && bun run bundle:scripts && electrobun build
scripts.build:app:stable: bun run build:native && bun run bundle:scripts && electrobun build --env=stable
